sizing_rule.note: When security weighting exceeds 1, divide optimal_f by weighting factor to get adjusted_f. Increase position units only when equity reaches the adjusted threshold (threshold / weighting_factor). Handles indivisible units constraint.

source_rule_text: When a security's weighting in an optimal portfolio exceeds 1, reduce position size by dividing the optimal f and threshold by the weighting factor; increase units only when equity reaches the adjusted threshold level.
